name: AutoFactory knowledge graph
description: Enables the knowledge-graph enrichment (ADR 0010): the pipeline composes a per-run graph from LaunchDarkly-native sources (service edges derived from observability traces, flag wrap points from find-code-refs at the PR SHA) and offers the research planner the query_dependencies tool for blast-radius analysis. Off = agents run un-enriched (the judge-score A/B baseline). The flag gates graph composition itself, so flag-off runs pay no cost.

variations.name: Enriched
variations.description: Compose the graph and offer query_dependencies to granted nodes.

variations.name: Baseline
variations.description: No graph; agents reason from the code alone.
